name: Curried Lentils with Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Spinach leaves, washed and chopped (stemmed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils.
2. Cook until tender but firm.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pot and, when hot, add garlic.
4. Sauté for 1 minute.
5. Add spinach leaves and steam until wilted.
6. Add lentils and the rest of the ingredients.
7. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
8. Serve over rice.
